name: hamamelis virginiana
title: best benefits of hamamelis virginiana
description: Hamamelis virginiana reduces inflammation, which refers to the body's natural response to injury or damage, characterized by pain, redness, and swelling, as the body's immune system attempts to repair and protect itself.
